channel.title: maven on Eastarpen の Blog
channel.description: Recent content in maven on Eastarpen の Blog

item.title: Maven 基础
item.description: 1. Maven 1.1 hello maven Windows download maven (apache maven download) config environment variables M2_HOME: maven/bin/ MAVEN_HOME: maven/ path add %MAVEN_HOME%/bin/ cofig maven conf/settings.xml mirror aliyun guide localRepository <localRepository>maven_home\repo</localRepository> <!-- using full path --> maven in Intellij Idea setting -> (search)maven Maven home path using maven you just downloaded User settings file using the config file you just wrote
